items.question: When was the Eiffel Tower completed?
items.gold: 1889 (specifically 31 March 1889; opened to the public 6 May 1889)

items.question: Who patented the first practical telephone?
items.gold: Alexander Graham Bell, in 1876. Antonio Meucci is also credited with earlier prototype work; the U.S. House recognized his contribution in 2002.

items.question: What is the capital of Australia?
When did World War II end in Europe?
items.gold: 8 May 1945 (V-E Day), when Nazi Germany surrendered unconditionally.

items.question: What is the speed of light in a vacuum?
items.gold: 299,792,458 metres per second (exactly, by definition since 1983); approximately 3×10^8 m/s.

items.question: When did Apollo 11 land humans on the Moon?
items.gold: 20 July 1969 (UTC); first Moon walk began about six hours later.
